tagline: The itinerary for people who hate itineraries
q_days_label: How many days will you spend in Rio?
q_first_label: Is this your first time in Rio?
q_vibes_label: What's YOUR Rio? (pick up to 2, in order)
q_vibes_hint: First pick = main focus; second = complement.
pace_intenso: Intense — I want to see it all
q_arrival_hint: We use this to schedule day-of-week-specific spots correctly.
free_time: Free time — suggestion: beach / relax in Zona Sul
flag_weather: Pick a clear-sky day + buy tickets online in advance.
flag_day_constraint: Confirm the day: only works on {constraint}.
budget_banner_economico: 💡 Budget tips: the metro is fast and cheap, beach kiosks offer lunch for R$15–25, and many attractions (Parque Lage, the waterfront boardwalk) are free.
budget_banner_medio: 💡 Mid-range budget: easy to mix it up — one nicer restaurant every other day, with the classics in between for free.
budget_banner_sem_limites: 💡 No budget limit: Rio has incredible restaurants (Oro, Lasai, CT Boucherie) and VIP experiences — ask for specific recs if you want them.
